title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A fantasy adventure following Bilbo Baggins on an unexpected journey with dwarves to reclaim a treasure guarded by a dragon.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones, using small, incremental changes backed by behavioral science.

title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
author: Douglas Crockford
description: A focused look at the best features of JavaScript, helping developers write cleaner and more reliable code by avoiding its pitfalls.

title: The Da Vinci Code
author: Dan Brown
description: A fast-paced mystery thriller following a symbologist unraveling a hidden conspiracy tied to art, history, and religion.
